hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "=== 前回からの引き継ぎ ==="; [ -f resources/progress.md ] && cat resources/progress.md || echo "進捗記録なし"; echo; echo "=== 残タスク ==="; [ -f resources/todo.md ] && cat resources/todo.md || echo "残タスクなし"'
bash -c 'ls manuscript/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1 > /dev/null && mkdir -p resources && echo "最終更新: $(date +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")" >> resources/progress.md'
bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.md && "$FILE" != */resources/* ]]; then COUNT=$(wc -m < "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "文字数: ${COUNT}字 [${FILE##*/}]"; fi'
